data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the 'Annual renewal requirement'.

However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The absence of any related evidence indicates a lack of clarity on whether this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
